case_title: FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY VS. GREGORY CLAYBORN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-13-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUN-25-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAYBORN, GREGORY $9,259.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,259.20, SEE SCANNED DOC
